tags.name: Location
tags.description: The Location API is comprised of endpoints you can use to manage location data. You can create, update, and delete a specific location. You can also retrieve data points, such as the location ID, description, and much more, for a specific location.

tags.name: Organization
tags.description: The Organization API is comprised of endpoints you can use to manage organization data. You can create, update, and delete organization related information such as organization unit type and cost center. You can also retrieve data points, such as the cost center ID, organization code, and much more.
